sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17511" key="au)onh/2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αὐονή</orth> (B), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">αὔω</foreign> B) <sense id="n17511.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cry,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0260.tlg001:7:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Semon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.20</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
